entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A staple food and fodder crop of marginal agricultural lands in sub-Saharan Africa and the Indian subcontinent, and a summer forage crop in the USA, Australia, and Latin America

entities.name: SUB-SAHARAN AFRICA
entities.description: Region where pearl millet is a staple food and fodder crop

entities.name: INDIAN SUBCONTINENT
entities.description: Region where pearl millet is a staple food and fodder crop

entities.name: USA
entities.description: Region where pearl millet is grown as a summer forage crop

entities.name: AUSTRALIA
entities.description: Region where pearl millet is grown as a summer forage crop

entities.name: LATIN AMERICA
entities.description: Region where pearl millet is grown as a summer forage crop

entities.name: BRAZIL
entities.description: Region where pearl millet is used as mulch in soybean production systems

entities.name: SOYBEAN
entities.description: Crop grown in Brazilian no-till production systems where pearl millet is used as mulch

entities.name: MOLECULAR MARKER TECHNOLOGY
entities.description: Technology used for the genetic improvement of crops

entities.name: GENETIC IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The process of improving the genetic traits of a crop

entities.name: SSR MARKERS
entities.description: Simple sequence repeat markers developed for pearl millet using ESTs and genomic data

entities.name: EXPRESSED SEQUENCE TAGS
entities.description: Short sub-sequences of a cDNA used to develop SSR markers

entities.name: CLUSTERING
entities.description: Computational process used to group ESTs into unigene sequences

entities.name: UNIGENE SEQUENCES
entities.description: Unique sequences derived from clustering ESTs, searched for SSRs

entities.name: DI-NUCLEOTIDE REPEATS
entities.description: The most abundant type of SSR detected in the EST sequences

entities.name: TRI-NUCLEOTIDE REPEATS
entities.description: A type of SSR detected in the EST sequences, less abundant than di-nucleotide repeats

entities.name: POLYMORPHISM
entities.description: Genetic variation detected across a panel of pearl millet mapping population parental lines

entities.name: MAPPING POPULATION
entities.description: A panel of parental lines used to test the ability of primer pairs to detect polymorphism

entities.name: LINKAGE MAP
entities.description: A map showing the relative positions of markers on a chromosome

entities.name: HOMOLOGY SEARCH
entities.description: A method used to compare EST-SSR positions with mapped rice genomic sequences

entities.name: RICE
entities.description: Crop used for synteny comparison with pearl millet genomic sequences

entities.name: PEARL MILLET-RICE SYNTENY
entities.description: The conserved order of genes or markers between the pearl millet and rice genomes

entities.name: DIVERSITY ASSESSMENT
entities.description: The use of markers to evaluate genetic diversity within a crop species

entities.name: MARKER-AIDED BREEDING PROGRAMS
entities.description: Breeding programs that use molecular markers to select for desired traits
